---
title: "Accessing the SeNorge Snow dataset"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Accessing the SeNorge2 Snow dataset}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
editor_options: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
  chunk_output_type: console
---

**Author**: Moritz Shore (moritz.shore@nibio.no)

**Date**: May, 2026

## Introduction

WIP

Here is an example script on how to access the snow dataset:

```{r, eval = F}
unlink("observed/snow/qsw", recursive = T)
dir.create("observed/snow/qsw", showWarnings = F)
verbose = TRUE

metnordic_coordwindow(
  area_path = "project_data/input/DEM/skuterud_basin_1m_drained.shp",
  area_buffer = 1000,
  source = "senorge_snow",
  verbose = verbose,
  interactive = F
) -> cw

senorge_buildquery(
  bounding_coords = cw,
  variables = "qsw",
  fromdate = "1990-01-01",
  todate = today()-1,
  grid_resolution = 1,
  verbose = verbose
) -> myq

senorge_download(
  queries = myq,
  directory =  "project_data/observed/snow/qsw/download",
  variables = "qsw",
  polygon =  "project_data/input/DEM/skuterud_basin_1m_drained.shp",
  verbose = verbose
) -> dldir

senorge_extract_grid(
  directory = dldir,
  outdir = "project_data/observed/snow/qsw/extract",
  area =  "project_data/input/DEM/skuterud_basin_1m_drained.shp",
  variables = "snow_melt",
  buffer = 250,
  verbose = verbose,
  map = verbose
) -> edir
```
